entities.name: JATROPHA CURCAS
entities.description: A plant species affected by black rot disease in India

entities.name: BLACK ROT
entities.description: A disease characterized by stem lesions, shrivelling, and gummosis in Jatropha curcas

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the black rot outbreak was observed

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: An Indian state where Jatropha curcas plantations were affected by black rot

entities.name: ASSAM
entities.description: An Indian state where Jatropha curcas plantations were affected by black rot

entities.name: CHHATTISGARH
entities.description: An Indian state where Jatropha curcas plantations were affected by black rot

entities.name: MADHYA PRADESH
entities.description: An Indian state where Jatropha curcas plantations were affected by black rot

entities.name: SUMMER SEASON
entities.description: The time of year when the disease outbreak was observed

entities.name: LEAF-DROPPING STAGE
entities.description: The dormant stage of Jatropha curcas that coincided with the disease outbreak

entities.name: MOISTURE STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress that triggers the leaf-dropping stage in Jatropha curcas

entities.name: DRYING
entities.description: A symptom of black rot observed in affected Jatropha curcas plants

entities.name: SHRIVELLING
entities.description: A symptom of black rot observed in the stems of Jatropha curcas

entities.name: STEM DISCOLORATION
entities.description: A symptom of black rot involving discoloration of the stem

entities.name: REDDISH-BROWN EXUDATION
entities.description: A sticky exudation at the base of plants affected by black rot

entities.name: BLACK LESIONS
entities.description: Soft and rotting lesions on the stem under the bark and cambium layer

entities.name: BLACK SPOTS
entities.description: Symptoms appearing on Jatropha curcas leaves and petioles caused by fungal isolates

entities.name: GUMMOSIS
entities.description: A symptom affecting hard-wood stems of Jatropha curcas

entities.name: BOTRYOSPHAERIA DOTHIDEA
entities.description: The fungus identified as the causal agent of black rot in Jatropha curcas

entities.name: MICROSCOPIC OBSERVATION
entities.description: Technique used to identify Botryosphaeria dothidea via hyphae and spores

entities.name: ITS SEQUENCING
entities.description: Technique used to identify Botryosphaeria dothidea and other fungal isolates

entities.name: MACROPHOMINA PHACEOLINA
entities.description: A fungal isolate found in affected Jatropha curcas tissues

entities.name: PHOMOSIS LONGICOLLA
entities.description: A fungal isolate found in affected Jatropha curcas tissues

entities.name: FUSARIUM OXYSPORUM
entities.description: A fungal isolate found in affected Jatropha curcas tissues

entities.name: ALTERNARIA ALTERNATA
entities.description: A fungal isolate found in affected Jatropha curcas tissues

entities.name: BAVISTIN
entities.description: A fungicide (carbendazim 50% WP) used to control the spread of black rot
